text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... The cabin should be... there? Just a little farther.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It really is a big star... This sleigh is a lifesaver. And lucky for me the
snow's letting up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make everyone happy. Just wait a little more!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ah! I think I see Oguri coming! Oguriii! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She made it back!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Just a little more, Oguri! ♪ Guys, should we go out to meet her?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Oguri! You can do iiit!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I hear them! I'm almost there! Just hold on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crumble!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! The snow's giving way...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Oguri, there's a cliff there! Back away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: (Back away?)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap just couldn't get ahead. She put everything she had into
her strategy... Do you think she was at her limit?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Maybe... I can't believe she couldn't pull it off. But... she tried, right?
Yeah, she gave it her all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
(No. I'm not going to back down again. I'm going to leap forward...
and make up for what I lost!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"Taking off"... is when an aircraft gains speed to lift up and into the
sky. Also implied is that it maintains its ascending trajectory.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's it! Time for takeoff! Hraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Hayahide & Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sh-she jumped!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Come on! I need to go... ALL THE WAY!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's Santa!
Oguri is Santa!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow... ☆ She really became Santa! Right, Marvey? Is this it?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's sparkly, exciting, and absolutely marvelous! This is what we've been searching for! A miracle! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There... I... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The tree has a star!
It's beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It really is an amazing star. Feels just right for a holiday spent with
friends... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Child Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too, Oguri! You were the coolest! It's like Santa really
came!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? I was so focused. I don't really remember it...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
It's true... You pulled the sleigh across the sky, just like Santa! With
this, you've given us another extraordinary gift.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I did? But I never found anything to give you...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
You gave us an incredible moment. Seeing you soar through the air
like that, I instantly recalled the excitement of first watching you race.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
And now I'm certain. In your next race... you're going to show us an
even greater miracle than you did today.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: You're amazing, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... Thank you. But I'm the one who received a present today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for coming here for me... Thank you so much. All your
encouragement and support makes me stronger. So...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I promise to give you that miracle in my next race. Keep believing in
me... And happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I really should speak with Oguri about her reckless behavior... Though
I suppose everything ended happily.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah. And you were finally relieved from Santa duty.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I think our work is done. Let's go back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Taishin. I actually helped create a miracle, as you requested.
Do you have anything to say?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Don't get all full of yourself, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Now who's not being honest? Well, you're right. Our role here
is done, so...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait! The miracle isn't over yet! Look outside, everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa... It's so pretty. We could barely see in front of us before.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Say hello, starry sky! ☆ Oguri blew away all the storm clouds with that
jump! ★

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No... It wasn't me. It's because you all wished for a miracle.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide, Taishin, Mayano, Marvelous... I want to thank all of you.
Now let's enjoy the party together!
